en: I think it's cotton. You're supposed to do something like, you're supposed, yeah, cotton.
ko: 너는 해야 할 일을 해야 해.

en: Cotton what? Anything cotton. What do I do with the cotton?
ko: 뭐든지 면이야. 면으로 뭘 해야 하지?

en: You know what I did for our second year, Portia and I, we do the thing.
ko: 우리 두 번째 해에 내가 한 일이 뭔지 알아?

en: And for the second year, it was cotton. And this is how much I love her, because I hate cotton balls.
But I made, I glued cotton balls, and I made the number two on a canvas
and framed it and did two out of cotton balls, because it was cotton.
ko: 그리고 그것을 액자에 넣고 면 볼로 2를 만들었어, 왜냐하면 면이었으니까.

en: So that's what I did. You can do anything stupid.
But for what? To present it to him?
Well, no, don't steal my idea. You're not going to do that.
I'm not going to do that number two in cotton.
ko: 나는 면으로 숫자 2를 하지 않을 거야. 들어봐.

en: Listen. Where is this thing now? All I'm saying is just.
ko: 그게 지금 어디 있어? 내가 말하는 건.

en: Do you still have it? Well, no, she threw it away.
Yes, she still has it. You're like an artist, right?
It was kind of a joke. But it's cotton, and it's cotton balls, because I hate cotton.
